enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song celebrates youthful exuberance and the carefree spirit of life, highlighting fun interactions and a vibrant lifestyle.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Maharaja, the song showcases a lively party atmosphere, emphasizing the protagonist's charm and charisma.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Benny Dayal and Nassar, with music composed by D Imman.

When was the song released?

My name is Raju baby was released on April 7, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In My name is Raju baby, the lively beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and celebration. The song reflects the carefree spirit of youth, as the characters revel in their vibrant lives. It conveys a sense of fun and camaraderie, making it perfect for parties and celebrations. The collaboration between Benny Dayal and Nassar adds a unique charm, making it a memorable track from Maharaja.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: My name is Raju baby from Maharaja is a vibrant celebration of youth and fun, featuring the dynamic voices of Benny Dayal and Nassar. This catchy track, composed by D Imman, perfectly captures the essence of carefree days and lively parties. With its infectious beats and playful lyrics, it's sure to get everyone on their feet!
stanzaMeanings: My name is Raju baby, Raju baby, Raju baby. Girls call me Joju kutti, Joju kutti, Joju kutti. Our story is a fashion trend. Science tells us about a fusion in it. This is a wonderful world, where both men and women shine. This is a youthful field, we are always bold.
My name is Raju baby, Raju baby, Raju baby. Girls call me Joju kutti, Joju kutti, Joju kutti.

Unlimited salary, the IT field provides. That's why life doesn't change much. In the hands of the beautiful, in the charm of the youth, until we are here, we won't be born again. That sky is very vast, this earth is very vast. We will do something new with this acid.
My name is Raju baby, Raju baby, Raju baby. Girls call me Joju kutti, Joju kutti, Joju kutti.
What you gonna do, what you gonna do when the crazy god comes just after you? Just have fun, just have fun...
In the moonlight, what is my youth? This is the best, all the old things are useless. Fantastic generation, overtaking everything. In jealousy, every day, I don't know what to say.
This is not just one track, don't speed too much. If a speed breaker comes, what will your condition be?
My name is Raju baby, Raju baby, Raju baby. Girls call me Joju kutti, Joju kutti, Joju kutti.
Our story is a fashion trend. Science tells us about a fusion in it. This is a wonderful world, where both men and women shine. This is a youthful field, we are always bold.
What you gonna do, what you gonna do when the crazy god comes just after you? Just have fun, just have fun...
